g.text: NEW: bridge AS triggers → TC visits
Open questions to resolve before wireframing
Is Clever sync the sole source of truth,
or do manual invites create parallel records?
Impacts: Students → Roster vs. Invite paths
How do TC's Facilitation Permission and
AS's assignment roles collapse into one RBAC?
Do screening / teacher support stay as
nav items (locked) or live in a marketplace?
Core insight: two complementary care models
Trigger: student or staff initiates a need
Roster → Signal → Assign skill/doc → Track → Escalate

svg.text: Drag this SVG into FigJam → every node imports as an editable shape. Convert to native stickies or sections as you iterate.
